# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'
      
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt
        
    - name: Build artifacts
      run: |
        # Add your build commands here
        echo "Building artifacts..."
        
    - name: Upload artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: built-artsifacts
        path: ./artifacts

  deploy-to-staging:
    needs: build-artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
    - name: Download artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: built-artsifacts
        
    - name: Deploy to staging
      run: |
        # Add your deployment commands for staging here
        echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
        
  deploy-to-production:
    needs: [build-artifacts, deploy-to-staging]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
    - name: Download artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: built-artsifacts
        
    - name: Deploy to production
      run: |
        # Add your deployment commands for production here
        echo "Deploying to production environment..."
